name: 17p13_1_BCL6B_SD
description: 17p13.1 SD modules near BCL6B and TP53 — small but recurrent duplicon cluster that contributes to 17p13.1 microdeletions (TP53 region) seen in cancer-predisposition cohorts.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~30 kb SD modules at ~96% identity flanking the TP53 unique segment; BCL6B-paralog component shared with several KRAB-ZNF clusters.
